title: Union hosts great derby
description: KAROO NEWS - Union's home derby against...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KAROO NEWS - Union's home derby against Cradock Primary and Aliwal North High was another one for the books.","html":"KAROO NEWS - Union's home derby against Cradock Primary and Aliwal North High was another one for the books."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From the youngest u.7 teams to the senior squads were alive with the spirit of competition and camaraderie as the learners from Union took to the various sport fields.","html":"From the youngest u.7 teams to the senior squads were alive with the spirit of competition and camaraderie as the learners from Union took to the various sport fields."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Rugby"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The rugby matches against Cradock saw challenging encounters.","html":"The rugby matches against Cradock saw challenging encounters."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The u.7A (0 - 15), u.9A (0 - 21), u.9B (14 - 19), u.11A (15 - 26), u.11B (0 - 50) and u.13B (0 - 34) teams faced tough defeats, while the u.7B team emerged victorious with a commanding 35 - 20 win.","html":"The u.7A (0 - 15), u.9A (0 - 21), u.9B (14 - 19), u.11A (15 - 26), u.11B (0 - 50) and u.13B (0 - 34) teams faced tough defeats, while the u.7B team emerged victorious with a commanding 35 - 20 win."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A special mention goes to the u.13A rugby boys, who played with extraordinary heart and passion. Their dedication and teamwork were evident throughout the match and despite a narrow 12-14 loss, they showcased excellent skill and sportsmanship.","html":"A special mention goes to the u.13A rugby boys, who played with extraordinary heart and passion. Their dedication and teamwork were evident throughout the match and despite a narrow 12-14 loss, they showcased excellent skill and sportsmanship."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The senior rugby teams delivered thrilling performances against Aliwal North.","html":"The senior rugby teams delivered thrilling performances against Aliwal North."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The u.14A team faced a tough 3 - 14 loss, while the u.15A and u.16A teams secured impressive victories, with scores of 17 - 12 and 50 - 5 respectively.","html":"The u.14A team faced a tough 3 - 14 loss, while the u.15A and u.16A teams secured impressive victories, with scores of 17 - 12 and 50 - 5 respectively."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The 2nd XV narrowly lost 6 - 10, but the 1st XV team triumphed with a decisive 24 - 3 win.","html":"The 2nd XV narrowly lost 6 - 10, but the 1st XV team triumphed with a decisive 24 - 3 win."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Hockey"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The hockey teams also had a stellar day on the field.","html":"The hockey teams also had a stellar day on the field."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Against Cradock Primary, the u.7A team dominated with an 11 - 1 victory, while the u.7B team followed with a 2 - 0 win. Although the u.8A and u.8B teams narrowly lost with identical 3 - 4 scores, the u.9A team secured a 3 - 1 win, and the u.9B team held a 1 - 1 draw.","html":"Against Cradock Primary, the u.7A team dominated with an 11 - 1 victory, while the u.7B team followed with a 2 - 0 win. Although the u.8A and u.8B teams narrowly lost with identical 3 - 4 scores, the u.9A team secured a 3 - 1 win, and the u.9B team held a 1 - 1 draw."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The u.10A and u.10B teams won their matches 4 - 0 and 2 - 0, respectively, while the u.13A, u.13B, u.13C and u.13D teams also clinched victories, showcasing their skill and determination.","html":"The u.10A and u.10B teams won their matches 4 - 0 and 2 - 0, respectively, while the u.13A, u.13B, u.13C and u.13D teams also clinched victories, showcasing their skill and determination."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The matches against Aliwal North were equally impressive, with the u.14A team winning 5 - 0, u.16A team winning 3 - 0 and the 1st team delivering a spectacular 12 - 0 victory."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The senior hockey B-sides' matches on Friday afternoon were played in Kariega, and they faced off against Hoërskool Brandwag.","html":"The senior hockey B-sides' matches on Friday afternoon were played in Kariega, and they faced off against Hoërskool Brandwag."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The u.16B team drew 1 - 1 and the u.14B team won 3 - 0. The third team played against Brandwag's 2nd team, losing 6 - 0, while our 2nd team drew 1 - 1 against Brandwag's 1st team.","html":"The u.16B team drew 1 - 1 and the u.14B team won 3 - 0. The third team played against Brandwag's 2nd team, losing 6 - 0, while our 2nd team drew 1 - 1 against Brandwag's 1st team."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Joubert Vorster (u.13A) running with the ball. Photo: Ben Snyman","html":"Joubert Vorster (u.13A) running with the ball. Photo: Ben Snyman"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
